questions.question: Why does traditional FinOps break on LLM spend?
options: Costs are token-transactions rather than resource-uptime; tags don't auto-propagate from API calls与you must stamp user/task/tenant at the call site

questions.question: Which three attribution dimensions does the lesson require instrumenting on day one?
Which four token layers should be broken out in cost attribution?
What is the kill-switch trigger in the enforcement ladder?
options: Tenant spend z-score > 4 relative to baseline; auto-pause tenant与page on-call

questions.question: Which unit metric does the lesson recommend instead of $/M tokens?
options: Cost per product outcome (e.g. cost per resolved support ticket, cost per generated article, cost per successful agent task)

questions.question: Which attribution pattern does the lesson call the highest-accuracy one mature teams use?
options: Telemetry joiner：join traces to billing via trace IDs
